normalization.notes: Store Old Persian cuneiform signs and word divider in NFC while preserving transliteration and inscription source references. Do not fold signs into Latin transliteration.

segmentation.pedagogical_units: Old Persian cuneiform signs, syllabic values, logogram-like title chunks, and the word divider
segmentation.notes: Old Persian cuneiform is encoded and left-to-right but corpus size is small and royal-inscription genre skew is high. Preserve inscription provenance and specialist-reviewed transliteration.
